race.comment: FALANGHINA (3) hasn't been beaten far in her past two despite missing the placings. Peaking now and with a genuine tempo she can be charging home late. LISELLE'S LUCK (11) has been knocking on the door all campaign and only needs a touch of improvement to land the winning blow. HIGH GARDEN (6) was tested in stronger company first-up but will find this much easier second-up. Milnes sticks and the rise to 1400m suits. Expecting sharp improvement. HARRINO (4) controlled the race on speed and kicked clear to break his maiden at Balaklava last time. This is tougher, but he's open to further improvement and is worth keeping onside. GRUELLING (2) drops in grade and brings ratings that measure up. Can give this a real shake if at his best.
